name: content-provider
description: Pin + replicate + availability policy on top of the runtime's kubo IPFS daemon. Sits between app capsules (publish / fetch / ensure / unpublish) and ipfs-provider (which is system-only).
author: HeyElastos

authority.reason: App capsules MUST NOT call ipfs-provider directly (system-only per CONTENT_AVAILABILITY); they go through content/*, which gates the pin lifecycle, will eventually enforce dDRM, and returns a signed availability receipt. This provider is the dispatch target for elastos://content/*.
